class.name: SlangSession
class.brief_description: A session provides a scope for code that is loaded.
class.description: A session provides a scope for code that is loaded. A session can be used to load modules of Slang source code, and to request target-specific compiled binaries and layout information. See the [url=https://shader-slang.org/docs/compilation-api/]Slang documentation[/url] for more information.

method.name: create_composite_component_type
method.description: Combine multiple component types to create a composite component type.

method.name: create_default_session
method.description: Create a session configured to use the default / built-in modules and preprocess macros.

method.name: get_builtin_macros
method.description: Gets the preprocessor macros declared for built-in modules included with the Godot Slang plugin. For example, this includes the GODOT_MAJOR_VERSION and GODOT_MINOR_VERSION macros.

method.name: get_builtin_modules_path
method.description: Gets the (globalized) path containing the Slang modules included with this plugin.

method.name: load_module_from_source_file
method.description: Loads a module into this session from a file path.

method.name: load_module_from_source_string
method.description: Loads a module into this session from a [String] containing the source code.

members.member: The default matrix layout for this compilation session. This should never be changed after loading any modules with this session, create a new session instead.
True if GLSL is enabled for this session. This should never be changed after loading any modules with this session, create a new session instead.
The target format to generate code for (e.g., SPIR-V, DXIL, etc.). This should never be changed after loading any modules with this session, create a new session instead.
The preprocessor macros to define for compilation. This should never be changed after loading any modules with this session, create a new session instead.
The profile to use for compilation. Consult Slang documentation for the list of valid profiles. This should never be changed after loading any modules with this session, create a new session instead.
The search paths to use during compilation when searching for included or imported files. This should never be changed after loading any modules with this session, create a new session instead.

constants.constant: A shared library/Dll for shader kernels (for hosting CPU/OS)
A CPU target that makes the compiled shader code available to be run immediately
Object code that contains CUDA functions.
Object code that can be used for later linking (kernel/shader)
C++ code for host library or executable.
Host callable host code (ie non kernel/shader)
A shared library/Dll for host code (for hosting CPU/OS)
SPIR-V assembly via WebGPU shading language
Bytecode that can be interpreted by the Slang VM
